programs.title: Grand Tours of Scotland's Rivers
programs.desc: Paul explores the Upper Dee from the Cairngorm Mountains to Balmoral Castle and Royal Deeside, and learns about a lost German Zeppelin and Queen Victoria's 'darling' man.

programs.title: Planet Earth II: A World of Wonder
programs.desc: A compilation from the wildlife documentary series presented by David Attenborough, visiting animals in their habitats across the globe, recorded in stunning ultra-high definition.

programs.title: QI XL
programs.desc: Sandi Toksvig takes a QI look at vices and virtues with Eshaan Akbar, Jo Brand, Rhys James and Alan Davies. Contains some strong language.

programs.title: This Is a Bomb:  The Nevada Casino Heist
programs.desc: Unbeknownst to the FBI, a quiet Hungarian immigrant landscaper, with no apparent ties to organised crime and no known record, concocts an elaborate extortion plan.

programs.title: Newsnight, followed by Weather
programs.desc: Insights and global interviews on the crucial news stories of the day. Followed by Weather.

programs.title: The People's Piazza: A History of Covent Garden
programs.desc: David Olusoga explores the 400-year history of London's Covent Garden Piazza.
